intitule: Identifying Key Information in a News Report

enonce.texte:
Read the news report below and answer the questions.

News Report: 'A big fire happened in the market yesterday evening. The fire started at 8:00 PM and lasted for three hours. Firefighters arrived quickly and stopped the fire. No one was hurt. The mayor said, 'We will help the affected people.'

questions.reponse: A big fire happened in the market.

enonce.texte:
Read the news story and change the verbs in brackets to the past tense.

'Yesterday, a bus accident ______ (happen) on the main road. The driver ______ (stop) the bus quickly. People ______ (arrive) to help. The police ______ (arrive) later and ______ (ask) questions.'

questions.texte: What is the past tense of 'happen'?
What is the past tense of 'stop'?
What is the past tense of 'arrive'?
What is the past tense of 'ask'?

enonce.texte:
Read the news report and write questions using 'What happened?' and 'Where did it happen?'

News Report: 'A heavy storm hit the village last night. The storm destroyed many houses and trees. People left their homes to find shelter. The government promised to help.'

questions.texte: Write a question to ask about the event.
Write a question to ask about the location.

enonce.texte: Rearrange the words to form correct sentences about a news event.

questions.texte: 1. happened / in the city / An accident / yesterday.
questions.reponse: An accident happened in the city yesterday.

questions.texte: 2. arrived / The police / quickly / at the scene.
questions.reponse: The police arrived quickly at the scene.

enonce.texte: Write a short news report (3-4 sentences) about an event that happened in your community. Include what happened, where, and when.

questions.reponse: A big football match happened in our village yesterday. Many people came to watch. The home team won the match. Everyone was very happy.

intitule: Completing Sentences with Past Tense Verbs

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct past tense of the verbs in brackets.

questions.texte: The children ______ (play) in the park all afternoon.

enonce.texte: Read the answers and write the correct questions using 'What' or 'Where'.

questions.texte: Answer: It happened on the highway.
Answer: The accident happened at 5:00 PM.

enonce.texte:
Listen to the teacher read a news report. Then answer the questions.

News Report: 'A school organized a clean-up campaign in the neighborhood. The students cleaned the streets and collected trash. The mayor thanked them for their hard work.'

questions.reponse: They cleaned the streets and collected trash.

enonce.texte:
Read the news bar below and answer the questions.

News Bar: 'Breaking News: Heavy rainfall causes flooding in the capital. Schools are closed. People are asked to stay indoors.'

questions.texte: What is the advice for people?

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph about a news event in your community. Use past tense verbs.

questions.texte: Write 4-5 sentences about a local news event.
questions.reponse: Last week, a new health center opened in our village. Many people attended the opening ceremony. The doctor gave a speech. Everyone was happy to have a new clinic. It will help many people.
